title: RPG/Carbine Rifle/Heavy Armor
popupHtml:
RPG/Carbine Rifle/Heavy Armor

RPG/Carbine Rifle/Heavy Armor in last cult building but be careful, these guys will open fire if you get physically close to them. The equipment respawns after you exit the building and run for 5 seconds.

title: Crowbar
popupHtml:
Crowbar

In front of a small garage door.

title: Minigun
popupHtml:
Minigun

Minigun (Railgun) on the top of the tower. - 6-barreled gun with extremely high rate of fire. - No upgrades - Can be customized: Black, Army, LSPD

title: Baseball Bat
popupHtml:
Baseball Bat

Behind the bleachers on the north side of the soccer field.

title: Molotov Cocktail
popupHtml:
Molotov Cocktail

On the top of the unfinished building, next to the yellow generator.

title: Carbine Rifle
popupHtml:
Carbine Rifle

Carbine Rifle under water in the middle of the cove. **Features:** - 30 Rounds - More accurate than Assault Rifle **Upgrades:** - 60 Rounds - Flashlight - Scope - Suppressor **Customization:** - Tinted (black) - Army - LSPD

title: Sub-Machine Gun
popupHtml:
Sub-Machine Gun

Sub-Machine Gun on the sunken barge.

title: Jerry Can
popupHtml:
Jerry Can

Between pumps at the gas station. Can of gasoline that can be used to leave a flammable trail. - Ignited by gunshot or Molotov Cocktail. - Will ignite other objects in its path.

title: Sticky Bombs
popupHtml:
Sticky Bombs

5 sticky bombs in the water. - Attach to **buildings and vehicles** - Blow doors off **security vans** - Use them in a **Drive-By**

title: Molotov
popupHtml:
Molotov

Located under the bridge. Collect the Molotov Cocktails, save the game, and reload. The Cocktails will have respawned.

title: Crowbar
popupHtml:
Crowbar

Outside the toilets.

title: Crowbar
popupHtml:
Crowbar

In front of a garage door.

title: Crashed Merryweather Cargo Plane
popupHtml:
Crashed Merryweather Cargo Plane

Site of the crashed weapons plane from [Minor Turbulence](https://gta.fandom.com/wiki/Minor_Turbulence) story mission. Multiple weapons scattered throughout debris field along with dead crew and $5000.

title: Grenade Launcher
popupHtml:
Grenade Launcher

Dive to the bottom of the ocean to find a Grenade Launcher. _Tip: Swim back to the surface, save the game and reload. The grenade launcher will have respawned, and this can be repeated as many times as you'd like!_

title: Grenade Launcher
popupHtml:
Grenade Launcher

Inside the hangar, up the back stairs along the catwalk.

title: Sniper Rifle
popupHtml:
Sniper Rifle

At the top of the air traffic control tower. Powerful long-range weapon. **Features:** - One clip - Built-in scope **Upgrades:** - Scope - Suppressor **Customization:** - Tinted (black) - Army - LSPD

title: RPG
popupHtml:
RPG

Powerful anti-vehicle weapon found on top of the western column of the Suspension Bridge. **Features:** - Fires slowly - Effective against tanks **Upgrades:** - Grip **Customization:** - Tinted (black) - Army - LSPD

title: Pistol
popupHtml:
Pistol

In the wrecked bus. Standard .45 calibre pistol. **Features:** - Clip (12 bullets) **Upgrades:** - Clip (16 bullets) - $387 - Flashlight - Suppressor **Customization:** - Tinted (black) - Army - LSPD

title: Jerry Can
popupHtml:
Jerry Can

Between pumps at the gas station. Can of gasoline that can be used to leave a flammable trail. - Ignited by gunshot or Molotov Cocktail. - Will ignite other objects in its path.

popupHtml:

title: Sawed-Off Shotgun
popupHtml:
Sawed-Off Shotgun

On a covered walkway inside the building, up the stairs. Very powerful Shotgun variant with low range, fire-rate and accuracy. **Features:** - Can be used in vehicle combat **Upgrades:** - None. **Customization:** - Tinted (black) - Army - LSPD

popupHtml:
SMG 2

title: Assault Rifle 6
popupHtml:
Assault Rifle 6

In a gazebo up the stairs to the right of some scaffolding in the back yard. Reliable weapon with average range. **Features:** - Clip (30 rounds) **Upgrades:** - Clip (60 rounds). - Grip - Flashlight - Suppressor - Scope **Customization:** - Tinted (black) - Army - LSPD

title: SMG
popupHtml:
SMG

Outside the building, beneath some arches a few steps away from the pool. Fast-firing Submachine Gun. **Features:** - Longer range and better accuracy than the Micro-SMG. - Clip (16 rounds). **Upgrades:** - Clip (30 rounds) - Flashlight - Scope - Suppressor **Customization:** - Tinted (black) - Army - LSPD

title: Grenades
popupHtml:
Grenades

At the edge of the beach, near some concrete pillars. Highly explosive device. - High cluster damage - Can trigger chain explosions - Can kill in one hit

title: Machine Gun
popupHtml:
Machine Gun

Underneath the road. Large weapon with high clip capacity. **Features:** - Clip (54 rounds) - High rate of fire - Good range - Armor penetration **Upgrades:** - Clip (100 rounds) - Scope **Customization:** - Tinted (black) - Army - LSPD
